children.label: A
children.text: accurately represents all of the information on the front and back of the original check as of the time at which the original check was truncated; and

children.label: B
children.text: bears the legend: “This is a legal copy of your check. You can use it in the same way you would use the original check.”; and
the consumer recredit rights established under when a consumer believes in good faith that a substitute check was not properly charged to the account of the consumer.section 5006 of this title

children.heading: Existing customers
children.label: 1 Existing customers
children.text: With respect to consumers who are customers of a bank on the effective date of this chapter and who receive original checks or substitute checks, a bank shall provide the notice described in subsection (a) to each such consumer no later than the first regularly scheduled communication with the consumer after the effective date of this chapter.

children.heading: New account holders
children.label: 2 New account holders
children.text: A bank shall provide the notice described in subsection (a) to each consumer who will receive original checks or substitute checks, other than existing customers referred to in paragraph (1), at the time at which the customer relationship is initiated.

children.heading: Mode of delivery
children.label: 3 Mode of delivery
children.text: A bank may send the notices required by this subsection by United States mail or by any other means through which the consumer has agreed to receive account information.

children.heading: Consumers who request copies of checks
children.label: 4 Consumers who request copies of checks
children.text: Notice shall be provided to each consumer of the bank that requests a copy of a check and receives a substitute check, at the time of the request.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Before the end of the 9-month period beginning on , the Board shall publish model forms and clauses that a bank may use to describe each of the elements required by subsection (a).October 28, 2003

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: A bank shall be treated as being in compliance with the requirements of subsection (a) if the bank’s substitute check notice uses a model form or clause published by the Board and such model form or clause accurately describes the bank’s policies and practices.

children.heading: Deletion or rearrangement
children.label: B Deletion or rearrangement
children.text: A bank may delete any information in the model form or clause that is not required by this chapter or rearrange the format.

children.heading: Use of model language not required
children.label: 3 Use of model language not required
children.text: This section shall not be construed as requiring any bank to use a model form or clause that the Board prepares under this subsection.
